{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Lindon's Sylvan Riverseed
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has a [[Sylvan Riverseed]] that sleeps in his lap.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
